title: Keyboard Basics
subtitle: touch, type, learn!
overview: Students explore computer keyboards by observing, touching and identifying different keys. They learn key names, keyboard sections and basic typing habits through fun hands-on activities.

images._note: Add real classroom photos of students using keyboards and identifying keys.

gallery.caption: A computer keyboard has many useful keys

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Close-up photo of alphabet keys
gallery.caption: Alphabet keys help us type letters and words

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Close-up photo of number keys
gallery.caption: Number keys are used for typing numbers
Enter key moves to the next line

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Students touching and typing on keyboard
gallery.caption: Students exploring keyboard keys together

keyTopics: Enter key — moves to next line
Arrow keys — move up, down, left and right
Typing with gentle fingers and proper care

youtubeVideos.title: Keyboard Basics for Kids
youtubeVideos.desc: Fun introduction to keyboard keys and typing for beginners.

youtubeVideos.title: Learn Keyboard Keys
youtubeVideos.desc: Easy explanation of alphabet, number and special keys.

activity.title: Find and Touch the Keys
steps: Find alphabet keys from A to Z
Touch number keys and say the numbers loudly
Use Enter key to move to the next line

quiz.q: Which device is used for typing letters and numbers?
quiz.explanation: Keyboard is used for typing letters, numbers and symbols.

quiz.q: Which keys are used to type A, B, C?
quiz.explanation: Alphabet keys help us type letters from A to Z.

quiz.q: Which key gives space between words?
quiz.explanation: Spacebar creates spaces between words while typing.

quiz.q: Which key moves the cursor to the next line?
quiz.explanation: Enter key moves typing to the next line.

quiz.q: How should we press keyboard keys?
quiz.explanation: Keyboard keys should be pressed gently and carefully.

quiz.q: Which keys help move up, down, left and right?
quiz.explanation: Arrow keys move the cursor in different directions.

quiz.q: Which keys are used for typing numbers?
quiz.explanation: Number keys are used for typing numbers from 0 to 9.

quiz.q: What should we keep clean while using computers?
quiz.explanation: Clean hands help protect the keyboard and computer.

quiz.q: What can students practice using a keyboard?
quiz.explanation: Students use keyboards to practice typing letters and words.
